channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Minnesota Bans Prediction Markets—And Is Sued By the Trump Admin Hours Later
item.description: Minnesota's ban has made it a felony to create or operate a prediction market in the state. The CFTC and DOJ say it violates federal law.

item.title: Even a mountain of T-bills won't save Tether and Circle from a sudden liquidity crisis, expert says
item.description: The head of digital assets and tokenization at one of Germany’s largest asset managers said that USDT and USDC are not stablecoins, from his perspective.

item.title: Data shows Bitcoin dip buyers waiting for lower prices: Is $70K BTC’s next stop?
item.description: Bitcoin futures and orderbook data show dip buyers waiting for a BTC price drop below $70,000.

item.title: This bitcoin bear market is different with 'uniquely pessimistic' traders limiting downside, K33 says
item.description: The research firm said bitcoin traders remain unusually defensive, reducing the risk of the kind of leverage-driven collapse seen in prior downturns.

item.title: Americans Arrested in Japan for Entering Punch the Monkey’s Zoo Home to Promote Meme Coin
item.description: Viral Japanese macaque monkey Punch received unwelcome visitors this week, as trespassers attempted to promote a Solana meme coin.

item.title: Bitcoin Miners Emerge as Unlikely Power Brokers in AI Infrastructure Race, Says Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein remains bullish on Bitcoin mining firms like IREN, Riot, and CleanSpark, who are all riding the wave of AI compute demand.

item.title: Google Unveils Gemini Omni—A Next-Gen AI Video Builder That Can 'Simulate the World'
item.description: Google's new multimodal AI model powers updates to Flow and Flow Music, including conversational video editing and AI-generated media tools.

item.title: Polymarket partners with Nasdaq to list private company contracts
item.description: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.

item.title: Google Launches Gemini Spark: A 24/7 AI Agent That Wants to Make You Ditch OpenClaw
item.description: Announced at Google I/O 2026, Spark is Google's most ambitious Gemini feature yet—a personal agent that manages your inbox, your calendar, and your workflows, with or without you watching.

item.title: Zerohash pursues new funding at more than $1.5 billion valuation after Mastercard drops investment plans
item.description: Crypto infrastructure providers are drawing renewed investor interest as Wall Street deepens its push into digital assets.

item.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE one of crypto’s most undervalued assets, says Bitwise
item.description: The crypto asset manager argued the market is mispricing Hyperliquid as a niche derivatives exchange instead of a fast-growing “super-app” for global trading markets.

item.title: Elizabeth Warren Calls Crypto Bank Charter Approvals for Firms Like Coinbase, Ripple Illegal
item.description: In a letter to the Comptroller of the Currency, Warren argued nine national trust bank charter approvals for crypto firms violated the National Bank Act.

item.title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters
item.description: The Massachusetts lawmaker asked the US Comptroller of the Currency to provide all communications between the agency and Donald Trump potentially related to the charter approvals.

item.title: The SEC wants to let newly public companies raise cash instantly in its biggest rule change in decades
item.description: The agency is proposing its largest overhaul of public listing rules in over 20 years, cutting compliance costs and giving crypto firms a much easier path to raise cash on Wall Street.

item.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
item.description: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.

item.title: People Are More Willing to Lie to AI Than Humans, Study Finds
item.description: Consumers feel less social pressure when lying to an AI chatbot, research finds, while human-like social cues reduce dishonest behavior.

item.title: The U.S. can’t lose the bitcoin race to China
item.description: The next global power competition is not being fought over missiles alone. It’s being fought over money, and right now, China is moving aggressively to shape the future of it, argues Gooden.

item.title: XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
item.description: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting an XRP price recovery over time.

item.title: Canaan Shares Plunge as CEO Says Middle East Conflict Is Clouding Outlook for Bitcoin Miners
item.description: Canaan shares fell after the Bitcoin mining company disclosed an $88.7 million first-quarter net loss, its second straight negative period.

item.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
item.description: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."

item.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
item.description: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.

item.title: Tor Project to lead Web3 crowdfunding to support internet freedom
item.description: Global internet freedom has declined for 15 consecutive years, with more countries restricting access to more of the internet, according to Freedom House.

item.title: ‘What's happening at the EF?’ Ethereum community looking for answers after high-profile departures
item.description: A wave of recent high-profile departures at the Ethereum Foundation has reignited longstanding questions from community members about what is going on inside the organization.

item.title: Former BNY exec launches NUVA, bets tokenization will remake Wall Street
item.description: NUVA launched this week with nearly $19 billion in tokenized real-world assets from Figure Technologies, aiming to bring regulated U.S. yield products into DeFi.

item.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy Gets Price Target Boost From TD Cowen After $2 Billion BTC Buy
item.description: Analysts at TD Cowen believe shares in Bitcoin-buying Strategy behemoth could jump more than 139% in the next 12 months.

item.title: Senator Elizabeth Warren accuses U.S. regulator of approving unqualified crypto banks
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee's top Democrat sent a letter to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency questioning the charters of nine crypto firms.

item.title: 21Shares says Hyperliquid ETF demand shows appetite for 24/7 trading
item.description: 21Shares says strong early flows into its new Hyperliquid ETF reflect growing investor demand for around-the-clock access to crypto and traditional assets.

item.title: Polymarket unlocks $5 trillion private market for retail traders, previously reserved for elites
item.description: Polymarket’s new private-company prediction markets let retail traders bet on startup milestones once reserved for Wall Street insiders.

item.title: Crypto IPO boom stalls as AI frenzy reshapes tech markets, says Fundstrat exec
item.description: Crypto firms are pausing long-awaited IPO plans as weak trading volumes and macro pressures weigh on valuations despite boom in AI-linked tech listings.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan officially recognizes foreign-issued crypto stablecoins as legal electronic payment methods starting June 1. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1nT2ZyXzZ6NXR2Zkcta2c4UUFWV1E3NW9rdjZGYlpuWXlTWjdPS0lmRlRFN1ozNHhXSTExLXkwRnhRRk5aTzZxQk5sRzlVOHZWdWpSUVJBR0g4V0tpVGRTWjB3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇯🇵 Japan officially rec…

item.title: Japan’s Ruling Party Pushes On-Chain Finance Plan to Protect Yen
item.description: Stablecoins and tokenized deposits could help Japan modernize payments and reduce reliance on foreign rails, the proposal says.

item.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
item.description: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up $77,000 as interest rates continue surge, stocks continue slump
item.description: Crypto markets have turned lower in morning U.S. trade on Tuesday as the idea of coming rate hikes takes a toll on risk assets.

item.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
item.description: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

item.title: JPMorgan says ether and altcoins won't catch up to bitcoin without a major network boom
item.description: The bank said ether and the broader altcoin market continue to trail bitcoin as weak network activity, sluggish DeFi growth and limited real-world adoption weigh on investor demand.

item.title: AI Slop Floods Bug Bounty Programs as Companies Struggle with Fake Reports
item.description: Bug bounty platforms and software companies are struggling to handle a surge of low-quality, AI-generated vulnerability reports.

item.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
item.description: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

item.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup
item.description: ZEC has jumped 18% in three days as privacy coins rally, defying a 3.45% drop across the wider crypto market.

item.title: South Korean funeral company records $33M unrealized loss on leveraged ETH ETFs
item.description: South Korea’s seventh-largest mutual aid company is currently sitting on a $33 million paper loss on its leveraged Ether ETF investment, following the crypto market downturn.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rises 2.1%
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR), up 2.8%, was also a top performer.

item.title: Hyperliquid is not a crypto app. It's a super app. It's not targeting the $3 trillion crypto economy. It's targeting the $600 trillion global asset market. Investors are valuing it as one thing. It's the other. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5aR2JBbTgzdmhCcElCX1lRaHQ4Ylh0R25LaWdCbUp0Rzg0SV80aEd2cUNMU3czcVgwM29TOFRJazlfX1ppcXdxaVRzb0NlNjBjWTFKNWVjeENWR3RqYkZsYTdB?oc=5" target="_blank">Hyperliquid is not a crypto app. I…

item.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
item.description: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.

item.title: Amid the Clarity Act fanfare is some worry over how a last-minute deal may punch DeFi
item.description: The crypto market structure bill saw a high-stakes, 11th-hour gambit to get Democrats on board for a bipartisan committee vote, but it might carry a cost.

item.title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
item.description: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Tokenization and US Financial Power
item.description: Thomas Cowan from Galaxy explores tokenization and US financial power on this episode of Bits to Bricks.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $649M in a Day as Long-Term BTC Holders ‘Limit Downside Potential’
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $648 million outflows Monday as long-term BTC holders continue to accumulate the cryptocurrency.

item.title: #Bitcoin doesn't look great. Far from it. Five consecutive days of red candles, liquidations on the long side, Michael Saylor buying another $2 billion in assets, and there's no momentum at all taking place. There's still an outstanding CME gap at $79,100 waiting - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9qOW5tbURuUzFvUkEyUzVuWGpyUEdPQ0ZTMU0zU3VQWHF6WG92R2VCTC1RSFRoY0RkODNTS0laWHJ0LXBNWnV5d05OdElCc09EQVE4b0JmSzlWblpSaktaMXVSMA?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin doesn't look great. Far…

item.title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
item.description: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

item.title: Bitcoin may bottom in October if historical reward-halving cycle holds
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 19, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin DeFi Platform Echo Protocol Hit By $76M Monad Exploit
item.description: Echo Protocol said that a compromised admin key had enabled unauthorized eBTC minting on its Monad deployment.

item.title: Wallet cluster earned $2.4M with 98% win rate on Polymarket military bets: Bubblemaps
item.description: Bubblemaps’ investigation found a cluster of nine accounts that generated $2.4 million with a near-perfect win rate on Polymarket contracts tied to major US military operations.

item.title: BSC’s quantum defense works. The trade-off is 40% slower transaction throughput.
item.description: BSC’s quantum-security test worked, but bigger transaction data slowed network throughput by about 40%.

item.title: Bitcoin treads water near pivotal monthly close while speculative tokens retreat
item.description: Bitcoin held near $76,800 as altcoins weakened, WLFI slid and traders watched whether the largest cryptocurrency can hold Tom Lee's line in the sand.

item.title: Ohio Man Gets 9 Years for $10M Bitcoin Trading Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Rathnakishore Giri falsely promised guaranteed returns on Bitcoin derivatives trading, using new investor funds to pay earlier participants.

item.title: Swan Bitcoin sued for nearly $1B over pre-bankruptcy transfers from Prime Trust
item.description: Swan Bitcoin has been sued for allegedly using insider access to pull nearly $1 billion in Bitcoin and cash from Prime Trust days before its 2023 bankruptcy filing.

item.title: Echo Protocol suffers $76 million exploit in eBTC minting attack on Monad
item.description: The Bitcoin-focused DeFi protocol suffered an attack whereby about 1,000 unauthorized eBTC $77 million were minted on the Monad blockchain

item.title: ⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation researchers Julian Ma and Carl Beek have resigned, bringing the total number of high-profile departures from the organization to at least eight in 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBYajhoSjI4TDhUZi1aTjZHLXdTMGZwWGVKWFhOY3poTnVoa2NOajI4U2lqRk5FcWF6Z1k4aklFU0JKVlE2TGJaSDhZN093Yi14d2IxdEktVDc5YzVyM3l3M3JLN3k?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation res…

item.title: Republican lawmakers call for permanent CBDC ban as House vote approaches
item.description: Tom Emmer, the House majority whip, is also advocating for his Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, which has passed the House but has yet to pass the Senate.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sees 2 more high-profile departures
item.description: Ethereum Foundation researchers Julian Ma and Carl Beek have resigned, bringing the total number of major departures from the nonprofit to at least eight in 2026.

item.title: BitGo creates modular digital asset infrastructure model for banks
item.description: The platform combines crypto custody, trading, settlement, staking and stablecoin infrastructure services for banks and financial institutions.
